title: aidevops Configuration
description: Configuration schema for the aidevops framework. Supports JSONC (JSON with Comments).

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor autocomplete and validation.

updates.description: Auto-update behaviour for aidevops, skills, tools, and OpenClaw.

auto_update.description: Automatically check for and install aidevops updates. Env: AIDEVOPS_AUTO_UPDATE

update_interval_minutes.description: Minutes between update checks. Env: AIDEVOPS_UPDATE_INTERVAL

skill_auto_update.description: Automatically check imported skills for upstream changes. Env: AIDEVOPS_SKILL_AUTO_UPDATE

skill_freshness_hours.description: Hours between skill freshness checks. Env: AIDEVOPS_SKILL_FRESHNESS_HOURS

tool_auto_update.description: Automatically update installed tools when user is idle. Env: AIDEVOPS_TOOL_AUTO_UPDATE

tool_freshness_hours.description: Hours between tool freshness checks. Env: AIDEVOPS_TOOL_FRESHNESS_HOURS

tool_idle_hours.description: Required user idle hours before tool updates run. Env: AIDEVOPS_TOOL_IDLE_HOURS

openclaw_auto_update.description: Automatically check for OpenClaw updates. Env: AIDEVOPS_OPENCLAW_AUTO_UPDATE

openclaw_freshness_hours.description: Hours between OpenClaw update checks. Env: AIDEVOPS_OPENCLAW_FRESHNESS_HOURS

upstream_watch.description: Automatically check upstream repos for new releases. Env: AIDEVOPS_UPSTREAM_WATCH

upstream_watch_hours.description: Hours between upstream repo watch checks. Env: AIDEVOPS_UPSTREAM_WATCH_HOURS

integrations.description: AI assistant and external tool integration management.

manage_opencode_config.description: Allow setup.sh to modify OpenCode config.

manage_claude_config.description: Allow setup.sh to modify Claude Code config.

orchestration.description: Supervisor, dispatch, and autonomous operation settings.

supervisor_pulse.description: Enable the autonomous supervisor pulse scheduler. Env: AIDEVOPS_SUPERVISOR_PULSE

repo_sync.description: Enable daily git pull --ff-only on clean repos. Env: AIDEVOPS_REPO_SYNC

max_workers_cap.description: Hard ceiling for pulse worker pool size after RAM-based calculation. Env: AIDEVOPS_MAX_WORKERS_CAP

quality_debt_cap_pct.description: Maximum share of worker slots quality-debt issues may consume. Env: AIDEVOPS_QUALITY_DEBT_CAP_PCT

pulse_model.description: DEPRECATED (v3.7+, GH#17769): Model routing is now derived from pool + routing table. This field is ignored. Remove from config.

headless_models.description: DEPRECATED (v3.7+, GH#17769): Model routing is now derived from pool + routing table. This field is ignored. Remove from config.

peak_hours_enabled.description: Cap MAX_WORKERS during peak hours to reduce session-limit pressure. Disabled by default. Env: AIDEVOPS_PEAK_HOURS_ENABLED

peak_hours_start.description: Start hour of the peak window (0-23, local time). Default 5 = 5 AM. Env: AIDEVOPS_PEAK_HOURS_START

peak_hours_end.description: End hour of the peak window (0-23, local time, exclusive). Overnight windows supported (start > end). Env: AIDEVOPS_PEAK_HOURS_END

peak_hours_tz.description: Timezone label for documentation. Pulse uses system local time (date +%H). Env: AIDEVOPS_PEAK_HOURS_TZ

peak_hours_worker_fraction.description: Fraction of off-peak MAX_WORKERS allowed during peak hours (0.2 = 20%). Result is rounded up, minimum 1. Env: AIDEVOPS_PEAK_HOURS_WORKER_FRACTION

safety.description: Security hooks, verification, and protective measures.

hooks_enabled.description: Install git pre-commit and pre-push safety hooks.

verification_enabled.description: Enable parallel model verification for high-stakes operations.

verification_tier.description: Model tier used for verification checks.

max_interactive_sessions.description: Maximum concurrent interactive AI sessions before warning. 0 disables. Env: AIDEVOPS_MAX_SESSIONS

ui.description: User interface and session experience settings.

session_greeting.description: Show version check and update prompt when starting an AI session.

shell_aliases.description: Add aidevops shell aliases to .zshrc/.bashrc during setup.

onboarding_prompt.description: Offer to launch /onboarding after setup.sh completes.

models.description: Model routing, tiers, and provider configuration.

tiers.description: Model tier assignments. Each tier maps to an ordered list of models.

models.description: Ordered list of models for this tier.

fallback.description: Tier to fall back to if all models in this tier are unavailable.

fallback_chains.description: Per-tier fallback chains for model-level failover.

quality.description: Code quality, linting, and CI/CD timing configuration.

sonarcloud_grade.description: Target quality grade for SonarCloud analysis.

paths.description: Directory and file path configuration. Supports ~ for home directory.
